name: Xjadeo
description: Video player that displays a video-clip in sync with an external time source (MTC, LTC, JACK-transport).

name: Xloadimage
description: Classic X image viewer.

name: XMLTV
description: Set of utilities to download TV listings and format them in XML.

name: XMMS2
description: Complete rewrite of the popular music player.

name: XPaint
description: Color image editing tool which features most standard paint program options.

name: xt7-player-mpv
description: Qt/Gambas GUI to mpv with a rich set of configurable options including filters and drivers, ladspa plugins support as well as library/playlist management, YouTube, online radios, podcasts, DVB-T and more.

name: xwax
description: Digital Vinyl System (DVS) for Linux. It allows DJs and turntablists to playback digital audio files (MP3, Ogg Vorbis, FLAC, AAC and more), controlled using a normal pair of turntables via timecoded vinyls.

name: Yarock
description: Modern looking music player, packed with features, that doesn’t depend on any specific desktop environment. Yarock is designed to provide an easy and pretty music browser based on cover art.

name: yEd
description: General-purpose proprietary diagramming program for flowcharts, network diagrams, UML diagrams, BPMN diagrams, mind maps, organization charts, and Entity Relationship diagrams.

name: Yoshimi
description: Software synthesizer, a fork of ZynAddSubFX.

name: YUView
description: Qt-based YUV player with an advanced analytic toolset.

name: zopflipng
description: Highly efficient PNG optimisation tool using Google's zopfli library

name: Zrythm
description: A feature-rich digital audio workstation with support for various plugin formats and advanced audio processing capabilities.

name: ZynAddSubFX
description: Fully featured software synthesizer capable of making a countless number of instruments, from some common heard from expensive hardware to interesting sounds that you will boost to an amazing universe of sounds.
